item.text: The residual-risk read looks clean on implementation correctness, and I don’t have a confident local code fix to make from this pass. I am going to rerun the full green gate now, then I’ll return a clean pass result with the few forward-looking uncertainties called out separately rather than inventing changes.

This pass didn’t change code, so the gate here is just confirming the tree stayed green while I audited the residual boundaries. Build and validate are through again, and the full suite is running now.

item.text:
- findings fixed: []

- findings surfaced to orchestrator:
  - `P3-S1`: Partial verifier-batch failures currently block the whole batch with a usable blocked envelope, but they discard any successful verifier report from the sibling lane. Why uncertain: Story 4 does not define a partial-success contract, so I did not change it, but future stories may care whether blocked batches should retain the successful verifier payload for routing or receipt purposes.

  - none
